data.body: MILESTONE: 4/6 tickets CLOSED — 79da (local signing), 4dc0 (CI signing), 1a51 (Gerrit classification+canary), 0ba4 (centralized finalize_event signing fix, landed on main 527a6e730 via Gerrit 746, completion-verifier PASS). 8d91 test landed (741, merged 817aaa84c). REMAINING (deployment-gated): 8d91 anchor decision + close; 8d39 flip. Both need 0ba4 LIVE across all writer builds. Forcing this machine's global-build auto-update now; CI uses main directly (next run signs); Gerrit VM autodeploys (ADR-0026). Then run 8d39 PRE-FLIP GATE (no active process writes unsigned non-SNAPSHOT), decide anchor, flip.
